arts.ttl: Commisso Stands Firm: Palladino Stays at Fiorentina Despite External Pressure
arts.sum: Fiorentina president Rocco Commisso has reaffirmed his support for manager Raffaele Palladino in a recent interview with TeleMia, addressing various topics including the team's current season, stadium plans, and transfer dealings. The post Commisso Stands Firm: Palladino Stays at Fiorentina Despite External Pressure appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Late Transfer Window Push: Fagioli in the Crosshairs
arts.sum: As the January transfer window enters its final hours, Fiorentina have emerged as one of the most active clubs in the market. The Tuscan side is not only pursuing Nicolò Zaniolo but has also set their sights on Juventus midfielder Nicolò Fagioli, showcasing their ambition to strengthen the squad significantly. The post Fiorentina’s Late Transfer Window Push: Fagioli in the Crosshairs appeared first on FootItalia.com.
